tools.name: workspace.list_files
tools.description: List fixture files available to the agent.

tools.name: provenance.inspect
tools.description: Inspect public source provenance, pin, license review state, and publication policy.

tools.name: artifact.read_text
tools.description: Read an approved fixture text artifact or excerpt.

tools.name: fastqc.parse_report
tools.description: Parse FastQC modules, statuses, basic statistics, and failed checks.

tools.name: qc_policy.evaluate
tools.description: Apply a declared deterministic QC policy to parsed metrics.

tools.name: verifier.submit_answer
tools.description: Submit a structured scientific-data answer to the deterministic verifier.
